title: Thai-Style Festive Pilaf
description: A flavorful and colorful one-pot dish that combines the richness of umami flavors with the sweetness of plum and the crunch of festive and chewy ingredients.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add onion, garlic, and chili pepper. Cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the plum, soy sauce, and coconut milk. Stir to combine.
Add the rice, toasted peanuts, and sesame sticks. Stir-fry until the rice is toasted and the ingredients are well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a serving platter. Garnish with additional sesame sticks and peanuts, if desired.
